programs.title: The Alto Knights
programs.desc: The year is 1957. Former friends from their teenage years, Frank Costello (Robert De Niro) and Vito Genovese (Robert De Niro), are now the most famous New York bosses, fighting for control of the city streets.When one day the first of them becomes the target of a failed assassination attempt by his rival, he decides it's time to step aside.He informs Vita about this, but he - a man paranoid about losing power - does not believe him.Soon he orders another attack.His victim is Albert Anastazja (Michael Rispoli), appointed by Frank as his successor.This event makes Costell realize that if he does not stop his rival, he will again attempt to kill both him and his loved ones.The conflict between two former friends and now rivals escalates, leading to a dramatic climax.A film inspired by real events.

programs.title: Kneecap
programs.desc: 2010. Liam (Mo Chara) and Naoise (Móglaí Bap) live in west Belfast.Growing up, they learned to speak Irish from the other's father, Arl (Michael Fassbender), who faked his own death to avoid repression from the British authorities and is now disillusioned with his son's hedonistic lifestyle.One night, Liam is arrested for drug possession.During interrogation, he refuses to speak English.So the police call in a translator, JJ Ó Dochartaigh (DJ Próvai), a music teacher at an Irish-speaking school.He helps Liam avoid charges and takes his notes with him.When at home he realizes that the lyrics are in Irish, he convinces the boy and his friend to start a hip-hop band, claiming that music would be a way to introduce the native language to the young generation.Liam names the group Kneecap.When the trio starts giving concerts, it turns out that crowds come to them.However, the musicians immediately begin to fall victim to sharp attacks from both the media and the extreme republican organization RRAD.Inspired by true events, the story of the creation of a popular Irish band.The main roles in the film were played by musicians who formed the group in reality.

programs.title: Life
programs.desc: Research carried out by a six-person team of cosmonauts is underway on the International Space Station.The crew makes a breakthrough discovery - they manage to observe the first evidence of life on Mars.However, the astronauts discover that the form of life they have found is unexpectedly intelligent, and at the same time dangerous.Behind the camera, Swedish director Daniel Espinosa, and on screen, among others:Oscar candidate Jake Gyllenhaal, Golden Globe nominees Rebecca Ferguson and Ryan Reynolds, and Hiroyuki Sanada - winner of the award granted by the Japanese Film Academy.The advantage of the production are its spectacular special effects.

programs.title: Sanctuary
programs.desc: Hal Porterfield (Christopher Abbott) orders room service at a posh hotel.Rebecca Marin (Margaret Qualley) shows up at the apartment to interview him for the position of general manager of this chain of facilities.Her questions become more and more personal and lead to a surprising ending.In reality, the woman is a dominatrix who follows the script prepared by Hal.However, the relationship does not follow the script ordered by the client.The woman decides to blackmail the rich man.She claims that she recorded a compromising sex tape with him.

actor: Man in the Hallway - Francisco Castaneda
Woman in the Hallway - Kathie Young

programs.title: Tripped Up
programs.desc: Lizzy (Leah Lewis) has always dreamed of becoming a chef.However, participating in a culinary reality show and later working in a New York restaurant became a source of frustration for her.A cooking enthusiast is one step away from giving up her greatest passion.The last chance to stay in the catering industry is to participate in a culinary festival.Together with her friends, Mary (Ashley Moore), Kai (Ariel Winter) and Taylor (Sasha Fox), she sets off on an adventure.If she fails, she is ready to look for another path in life.Unfortunately, the team has been plagued by bad luck since the beginning of the expedition.

programs.title: Little women
programs.desc: The times of the Civil War.In the absence of their father, who is serving in the military away from the family, the four March sisters from Orchard House are cared for by their mother alone.Marmee wants them to find their own path and helps them enter adulthood.Each of them has a different personality.The oldest Meg dreams of becoming an actress.Family-oriented and warm, Beth has a talent for playing the piano.Jo, an aspiring writer, pursues her goal with her characteristic energy and tenacity.Amy, a bit smart, wants to become a painter.Despite their own problems, the girls are not indifferent to other people's suffering.Young women will get to know the taste of first loves and disappointments.Fate subjects them to tests, after which their lives will never be the same again.
